title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-shell-extensions bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-shell-extensions is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: GNOME Shell extensions allow for modifying the default GNOME Shell interface and its parts, such as window management and application launching. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): gnome-shell-extensions will only show 4 Workspaces no matter the number supplied  [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129121)  Slowdown in gnome-shell after 30 minutes (JIRA:RHEL-129131)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for gnome-shell-extensions is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

GNOME Shell extensions allow for modifying the default GNOME Shell interface and its parts, such as window management and application launching. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): gnome-shell-extensions will only show 4 Workspaces no matter the number supplied  [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129121)  Slowdown in gnome-shell after 30 minutes (JIRA:RHEL-129131)
